name: BMI Calculator
desc: Calculate your BMI and find out if your weight is healthy for your height.
seo_title: BMI Calculator – Body Mass Index Online Free
seo_description: Use our free bmi calculator (body mass index) to quickly estimate imc, categoria based on peso_kg, altura_cm, sexo. No registration needed.
result_context: The IMC calculado indica The categoría of weight; un value between 18.5-25 se considera saludable to The mayoría of adultos.
steps: Mide tu weight in kilogramos (ej: 70 kg)
Mide tu height in centímetros and converts a meters (ej: 175 cm = 1.75 m)
Eleva The height to the square (1.75² = 3.0625)
Divide The weight between The height to the square (70 ÷ 3.0625 = 22.8)
Compara with rangos: <18.5 low weight, 18.5-25 normal, 25-30 sobrepeso, >30 obesidad
mistakes: Use height in cm without Convert a meters (da IMC 10000× greater)
No Consider que IMC no distingue músculo of grasa (atletas salen as sobrepeso)
Apply rangos adultos a niños or adolescentes (usan percentiles per edad)
